full_text: Nortje to Kumara, Kumara Run Out!! Back-to-back wickets to cap the innings off! So this is short and fast outside off, Kumara backs away but can't connect and they try to steal the bye. full_text: Nortje to Chameera, Bowled!! The basic tailender dismissal! Nortje goes fast, attacks the sticks and Chameera had no chance after backing away early. Tries to get bat on ball, but the lower bounce and blistering pace does him in totally. The off stump is rattled.

full_text: Nortje to M Theekshana, , precious runs for the Lankans! Was a good ball from Nortje, followed Theekshana with a pacy in-angler and squared up the tailender properly. Big edge but wide of de Kock and no chance for third man who was squarer

full_text: Pretorius to Nissanka, Caught by Nortje!! This is crafty death bowling from Pretorius! Simply giving the batters no pace to work with and now has the big one of the well-set Nissanka. Tries to heave it away on the leg-side, hasn't got the pace to connect, finds deep mid-wicket with precision. SL not quite getting the final flourish they would have loved after that Rabada over.

Karunaratne is down the track, trying to create some impetus into the shot but still has nothing much to add, mistimes the loft and holes out to long-on. SL would have liked him to bat through, given his hitting skills. Everything now rests solely on Nissanka.

The over was shaping up to be a big one for SL but as has been the norm all this innings, they lose a wicket.

full_text: Pretorius to Shanaka, , ugly runs but runs nevertheless and SL will grab every single one of them. Shanaka wanted to slog this hard over mid-wicket. lost his shape a bit and got a thick edge. Just wide of de Kock and away to the third man fence

It was the last over of Shamsi's spell and seeing him off might have been the wiser option. Hasaranga thinks otherwise, sees one floated up and looks to go downtown, only to mistime it badly. Markram takes a good low catch, diving forward at long-on. Everytime SL have got some momentum, they have been pegged back with a wicket.

And Sri Lanka sink further, as almost half their side is back to the pavilion. Onus on Nissanka to carry on and help Sri Lanka post a respectable total.

full_text: Karunaratne to Bavuma, van der Dussen Run Out! It's the C-word in full force here! A run-out. A crucial run-out sends van der Dussen on his way. Just a push into the off-side from Bavuma, and he takes off for the single, sells VdD down the river, and that's a direct hit at the non-striker's end. Rassie hasn't even made it back with the dive, and that's a big break for SL.

full_text: Chameera to de Kock, Caught&Bowled!! ! In a matter of few deliveries, he has turned the tables in terms of momentum. Another sharp delivery, this is dug in short and de Kock being a compulsive puller was always going to take it on. Got rushed by the extra pace and could only get a soft top edge, straight up and Chameera himself races forward to take it. What an over this is turning out to be!

short_text: Chameera to R Hendricks, Lbw!! CGood usage of the surface this, banged it on a shortish length with good pace, pinned He
full_text: Chameera to R Hendricks, Lbw!! CGood usage of the surface this, banged it on a shortish length with good pace, pinned Hendricks on the crease and he couldn't get his bat down in time. Rapped on the back pad and it looked close even in real time. The ump felt it was good enough too. Hendricks's only real chance was with height but at Sharjah, these decisions rarely go the batter's way. Three Reds on ball tracking and he is sent packing. Timely strike for SL because the runs were coming steadily.
